videos.headline: Gabriel hits Mims for a TD as Oklahoma scores just before halftime
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel connects with Marvin Mims for a 36-yard touchdown just before the half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gabriel hits Mims for a TD as Oklahoma scores just before halftime) 2022/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marcus Major makes a guy miss and scores for Oklahoma
videos.description: Marcus Major takes the draw and runs in a 16-yard touchdown for the Sooners.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marcus Major makes a guy miss and scores for Oklahoma) 2022/09/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel goes long to Marvin Mims for another Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Marvin Mims hauls in a 58-yard touchdown to pad Oklahoma's lead over Kent State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel goes long to Marvin Mims for another Oklahoma TD) 2022/09/10 ESHEET
